notes: Post-log note (2026-06-11): the entered DK lineups were SaberSim imports, NOT the archived portfolio in lineups.md. The in-app build landed 18:49 ET vs a 19:07 lock after a long spinner; with no time to review, the user swapped to two untracked SaberSim lineups near lock. The abandoned portfolio's Lineup 2 contained the winning skeleton (PHI 5-stack + Luzardo + Detmers — 6 of 10 players shared with the $4K winner). Grade the entered (untracked) lineups as the played portfolio; the archived lineups.md was built but not entered.
